You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[8-14] The camera pans left, recentering the grill and moving the tray to the right edge, partially cutting off the rightmost bun. The scene remains static with glowing coals under the grate and the raw food waiting on the tray. [14-18] The camera zooms in and pans left, shifting the view to focus tightly on the black kettle grill's interior. Consequently, the orange tray holding the raw patties and buns moves completely out of the frame to the right. Only the metal grate, foil packet, and glowing coals remain visible in the shot. [18-26] The camera maintains a static, high-angle view of the black kettle grill's interior, zooming in

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] A black kettle grill is open, revealing glowing coals under the right side of the grate and a foil-wrapped item on the left. An orange tray on the side shelf holds a white plate with three raw, pink beef patties. Two hamburger buns sit on the tray. The camera holds a steady shot then zooms in. [6-8] The camera pans right, shifting the grill to the left edge and centering the orange tray. Two golden-brown buns are fully visible at the top, above the plate of three raw, seasoned patties. [8-14] The camera pans left, recentering the grill and moving the tray to the right edge, partially cutting off the rightmost bun. The scene remains static with glowing coals under the grate and the raw food waiting on the tray. [14-18] The camera zooms in and pans left, shifting the view to focus tightly on the black kettle grill's interior. Consequently, the orange tray holding the raw patties and buns moves completely out of the frame to the right. Only the metal grate, foil packet, and glowing coals remain visible in the shot. [18-26] The camera maintains a static, high-angle view of the black kettle grill's interior, zooming in

[96-100] The camera shifts right and zooms out then in, framing raw beef patties on aluminum foil on the left grate and gray charcoal briquettes with glowing embers and small orange flames on the right. [100-104] The view zooms out to reveal three patties, then zooms in to focus on two patties with a third partially visible at the top edge, while charcoal continues burning beneath the right grate. [104-108] The camera zooms out to show all three raw patties on the foil again, maintaining a static high-angle view of the open black kettle grill with flames flickering among the ash. [108-112] The framing adjusts to highlight two seasoned patties on the left while the charcoal fire persists on the right side within the black rim.

[112-120] A high-angle shot captures three raw, seasoned beef patties resting on aluminum foil on the left side of a black kettle grill's metal grate. To the right, gray charcoal briquettes burn with small, flickering orange flames. The camera zooms out slightly to fully reveal the third patty and the grill's rim.
[120-126] The scene changes to show the three beef patties, now browned, cooking directly over high orange flames on the right side. The aluminum foil on the left is empty. Smoke rises from the grilling meat as flames flare up. The camera zooms out to display the full black kettle grill and an attached side shelf.

Initially, three browned beef patties grill over intense orange flames on the right side, while the left holds empty foil. Between 128s and 130s, the patties are moved to the left, resting on the crinkled aluminum foil. For the duration, three cooked, dark brown patties sit on the foil away from direct heat. On the right, orange flames flicker among gray charcoal briquettes beneath the grate. The scene remains static with the food resting, accompanied by a slight camera zoom around 134s.

[140-142] Three cooked dark brown beef patties rest on crinkled aluminum foil on the left grill grate, while orange flames flicker among gray charcoal briquettes on the right. [142-146] The scene shifts to a bright orange tray holding toasted buns, cooked patties, and a steak sauce bottle; a finger points toward the tray where one burger is assembled with pickles and red sauce. [146-150] A glass jar labeled "Bread & Butter Chips" containing green pickle slices hovers above the tray, which holds assembled burgers and a loose patty. [150-152] The jar is removed, revealing the tray with burgers topped with pickles and red sauce, toasted buns, and the loose patty. [152-156] A red sauce bottle labeled "SPORT SERVICE SECRET STADIUM SAUCE" is held directly above the bottom-left burger topped with pickles.

recent_thinks: [156-158] A red sauce bottle labeled 'SPORT SERVICE SECRET STADIUM SAUCE' lifts slightly upward and left, hovering above a burger topped with pickles on an orange tray. Other assembled burgers, toasted buns, and a loose patty remain stationary on the tray surface nearby. The bottle moves slightly away from the burger.

[158-160] A red sauce bottle labeled 'SECRET STADIUM SAUCE' descends, hovering directly over a burger topped with pickles on an orange tray. The bottle positions itself above the condiments while other assembled burgers, toasted buns, and a loose patty remain stationary on the tray surface nearby.

[160-162] A red sauce bottle labeled 'SECRET STADIUM SAUCE' lifts upward and left, moving away from a burger topped with pickles and red sauce on an orange tray. Other assembled burgers, toasted buns, and a loose patty remain stationary on the tray surface nearby.

[162-164] A red sauce bottle labeled 'SECRET STADIUM SAUCE' lifts upward and left, moving away from the burger topped with pickles. A finger enters from the bottom left corner, pointing towards the orange tray which holds the assembled burgers, loose patty, and toasted buns.

[164-166] A hand with a dark sleeve reaches down from the top left corner to grab a toasted bun on the orange tray. The fingers make contact with the bread. The red sauce bottle remains in the upper left, while the assembled burgers and loose patty stay stationary on the tray.

[166-168] A hand lifts a toasted bun from the upper left section of the orange tray, holding it suspended above the surface. The bread, showing golden-brown grill marks, is moved toward the loose cooked patty in the center. The assembled burgers topped with pickles and the red sauce bottle remain stationary on the tray.
